---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Sora UI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I want a specific variant of the CD player that has X..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this enhancement will improve developer experience or visual appeal.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, code snippets, or reference links here.
